headline: Cisco Unveils Research Prototype Of New Switch In Quantum Networking Push
summary: Cisco announced a working research prototype of a "Universal Quantum Switch" for quantum networking. Cisco stock has gained 16% in 2026.

headline: Cisco Introduces Universal Quantum Switch, Advancing the Path to a Quantum Network
summary: Cisco (NASDAQ: CSCO) today announced the Cisco Universal Quantum Switch, a critical milestone in quantum networking that addresses one of the most fundamental barriers to building a quantum network. As a working research prototype, it is the latest proof point in Cisco's accelerating full-stack quantum networking program, built on years of foundational research, real-world demonstrations, and a growing ecosystem of strategic collaborations.

headline: How Cisco Systems (CSCO) Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Views And New AI Moves
summary: Cisco Systems has seen its Fair Value price target move slightly, with the model shifting from US$89.04 to US$89.09. That small change sits alongside mixed analyst commentary, where some firms such as JPMorgan and Citi have raised targets while others, including Erste Group, have turned more cautious on margins and rating. As you read on, you will see how these differing views and small model tweaks can matter when you are tracking Cisco's evolving story. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: Former CyberArk and Cisco Leader Joins Akeyless as It Scales Identity Security for the Agentic Era
summary: Akeyless, a company redefining identity security for the AI era, today announced the appointment of Yael Fainaro as Chief Strategy Officer (CSO). Fainaro will lead strategic partnerships and ecosystem expansion to help organizations address a rapidly escalating wave of AI-driven identity risk. She brings deep experience in corporate strategy, business development, and partnerships across cybersecurity.
